  apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ p.Prime := by
  obtain ⟨p, h₁, h₂⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  refine' ⟨p, _, h₂⟩
  linarith

-- Example usage: finds a prime greater than 100
#eval (Nat.exists_infinite_primes 101).choose
after_snippet:

theorem strict_mono_comp {α β γ : Type*} (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : StrictMono (g ∘ f) :=
  StrictMono.comp hg hf

theorem strict_mono_comp {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] 
  (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : 
  StrictMono (g ∘ f) := StrictMono.comp hg hf
